description.value:
You trap a target in a sphere of sand, which weighs as much as the subject, and can be moved by the Sand Manipulation ability if it is light enough. If the target is mounted, use the mount's Reflex save. Both the mount and its rider are captured if the save fails, as long as the sphere can hold them both. If the mount is bigger than Large, it cannot be caught in the prison.

Captured creatures can breathe and move freely within the sphere, but suffer a 50% failure chance when attempting to perform any technique with the Mobility, Half-Seals or Hand Seals component(s), or use spells with a Somatic component. While inside, they are protected from all attacks and area affects, which will affect the sphere instead.

The sphere has Hardness 10, hp equal to three times your level, and is immune to earth damage. It has a Defense of 12 and can be attacked from within, though the attacker takes a -4 penalty to hit. Alternatively, it can be destroyed by a Break check (DC 35). If the sphere suffers fire damage equal to half its hit points or more, it turns to glass, and becomes useless once the duration expires (though it is still destroyed if it suffers enough fire damage in one hit).

You can use the Sabaku Sousou technique on enemies within the sphere with increased effect (see Sabaku Sousou).
